title: Cobblemon Auto Tidy Up PC
description: An add-on for the Cobblemon mod that automates storage on your PC. This is a client display only.
body:
![IG Capture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/01d98843aa03bfe6571816ab98c1fcf620d13c35.png) 

Tidy Up PC is a simple, client‑side Cobblemon addon that makes managing your Pokémon storage effortless. With just a few clicks, you can temporarily reorganize your PC boxes according to:

- Pokédex Order
- Level
- IVs
- Gender
- Shiny Status
- Alphabetical (A–Z)

You can apply the sort to all boxes at once or limit it to the currently open box—perfect for quick tidying between catches and trades.
The Pokémon's original position in the PC is indicated when it is hovered, making it easy to find when you disable sorting! 

To exit sorted mode, simply reclick on the active sorting mode button.

Important: Because this is a purely client‑side mod, your sorting changes are not applied on the server and will reset when you reconnect. It’s a convenient way to keep your own view organized, without affecting anyone else’s game world.
